title: some bones to pick
wikitext:
[]: some bones to [pick]             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Tue Oct 20, 2015 5:02 pm Some guy said that he felt disturbing that Adam and lillith were used in the series, are intended to be used, as powerful yet apathetic lumps of flesh, unable of independant acts and thoughts, being manipulated by people and their goal. I understand why many people want to accept the FAR stuff as canon, it gives a rational to that disturbing fact. - But why would Adam and lillith have a soul of their own, if they can't act on their own ? Maybe a clue that the series is more symbolic than coherent in a matter-of-factly, clear-cut materialistic way. Thinking more about what the Seeds are meant to represent, shed light on their strange "apathetic" behaviour. For exemple, - how lillith is kept locked underground between the 2nd impact, and the moment Rei impaled her with the Spear? One, supposing it was found with Lillith to begin with(otherwise it's just more confused) they removed the Spear to use it on the new found Adam, then 2I and the spear is lost for a time. Then Lillith is cut in half and her/his low part is used for Shogoki. How is lillith fixed to her cross before, without the Spear ? - How then, is her fixed after the extraction of Sho ? Why the fuck can't such a giant move a inch in several years, just because of some tiny stakes ? Ok, it got its soul removed from it, but : nothing proves that the whole messing with Lillith's soul was wanted since the creation of Gehirn, so Yui has nothing to do with the Lillith's clone rising project, so the removal of its soul can not be thought as part of a tight agenda to keep Lillith incapacited on its cross, unable to regenerate enough to flee and tang us(why would her, by the way ?).

[]: Re: some bones to eat             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Oct 20, 2015 5:32 pm Umm... rather hard to work out just what it is you're wondering here man, but here's the gist of it as far as we know: Adam was found in antarctica with the lance impaling it. Researchers removed the lance for study elsewhere but brought it back to try and control Adam during the contact experiment... which obviously didn't work out so well for them. After that Adam is active as Kaworu. Lilith was dormant for reasons unknown before creating Eva 01, but Rei was likely created during or shortly after this period as the two were still connected when Yui had her contact experiment. Rei is Lilith, so she is also active. The "FAR stuff" is heavily implied in the series since we're told the two 'eggs' were not natural objects and that the seeds both came from off-world. Any details about their reasons and methods however are founded only on extra-canonical materials and can be largely ignored.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Tue Oct 20, 2015 5:39 pm "Seeds" implies that's their function so that's why they are lumps. Don't know enough about metaphysics or religion but souls are required to generate life as far as evangelion goes.

[]: Re: some bones to eat             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 20, 2015 9:53 pm NemZ wrote: Any details about their reasons and methods however are founded only on extra-canonical materials and can be largely ignored.

[]:             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Wed Oct 21, 2015 8:11 am I read the post concerning FAR lore, yet I am unsatisfied, it would kill the essential symbolism and what it stands for. For obvious reasons, like the fact relying on panspermia resolves nothing, as you're still bound to wonder what creates the FAR, or why the fuck humans didn't evolve the same natural way as them. I just don't like these circular ideas, my mind just can't settle with them. Yes, it was said the Eggs weren't natural structures. But that doesn't mean someone had to make them, it means something living did. I always took for granted, prior to coming in this forum, that this statement meant Adam and lillith made their own egg, period. Adam and lillith would be the ancestors, period. As to who and what made them, let's say nature, or God ! Both are fine, as both would bestow on their spiritual/transpersonal meaning for the show, whereas merely having been designed do nott reflect that well this actual meaning(whatever it is, by the way). I have to explain a bit my own rational, otherwise I would seem rather stubborn or dense to some people. There's no meaning to be felt behind ' oh, fucking FAR you couldn't forsee this accident ', so it sucks. And would Anno have explicitely added in NGE such notions, then NGE would have sucked a little bit more(glad he didn't in the end). I would have to stay oblivious to some "canon" material, which is unsettling for the least to a fan, but would be the only way to keep evangelion completely symbolically sound. I would still wonder what some-element is to mean, regardless of the "canon" explanation. I prefer Eva the way it is, with relative plot holes subject to fanwanking, rather than more complete and sound story line, but not fitting to its own deep meaning. So, you can sacrifice coherence and purity in signification for coherence in scenario. But, firstly, it creates additional questions and 'somehow/somewhat', secondly, it would still be an error of the author not to have separate enough or feel enough the difference between his own insights and inspirations about the spiritual or transpersonal truths (which is all a good cultural creation is about ). If that some novel merely entertained you, it would somehow be lacking. It would be interchangeable. In fact, I believe one may not find any worth in something, if that thing doesn't resonate with your past or inner self in any way. But that "resonance" can be misleading, and induce in you biases uncalled for(like a increased pervert liking for undersized panties and dirty poses, just because you happened to like Britney Spear's mere body or voice. Lillith was dormant for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Oct 21, 2015 12:57 pm I read the post concerning FAR lore, yet I am unsatisfied, it would kill the essential symbolism and what it stands for. For obvious reasons, like the fact relying on panspermia resolves nothing, as you're still bound to wonder what creates the FAR, or why the fuck humans didn't evolve the same natural way as them. I just don't like these circular ideas, my mind just can't settle with them.

[]:             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Wed Oct 21, 2015 3:11 pm You can say all this because you don't perceive at all what I do in the symbols of the series, you think symbols and names or more or less gratuitous. As long as you do, for sure we won't agree on much things ! If you feel ok with these hard science SF concepts, and see only in the Seeds(by the way, I called them so by conveniance) what they are in-universe, you won't ever grasp "mystical" notions like Essences, Eternal Feminine and the like. I wonder if guys like you believe that love and pleasure is nothing more than the way nature found to trick us into making babies ? [s]rethorical and gratuitous [/s] That's a problem with you, not the literature.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Oct 21, 2015 3:39 pm mehdi_saada wrote: You can say all this because you don't perceive at all what I do in the symbols of the series, you think symbols and names or more or less gratuitous. As long as you do, for sure we won't agree on much things !

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Oct 21, 2015 5:13 pm I tend to agree that comments from the author or anything outside the show itself should generally be ignored, but I'm not really getting what it is you're trying to say Mehdi. If you want to actually convince others to accept ideas so far out of the 'mainstream' around here then you're going to have to present your thoughts in a clear and systematic way, not a rant with new things being tossed in as they come to mind. It would also help if you would double-space between paragraphs to make your posts a little easier on the eyes.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Oct 21, 2015 5:21 pm NemZ wrote: I tend to agree that comments from the author or anything outside the show itself should generally be ignored,

[]:             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Thu Oct 22, 2015 9:52 am I didn't mean to insult people not agreeing with me. Here is a systematic exposition. 1) Bagherra : you know what "uncouscious" mean ? You do something, but you can't know the full implications and real motivations behind it. So it's commonplace to try and read beyond the lines, if you never do, you turn away from 100 years of psychological researches which is your choice, but to many not the clevest one. 2)According to C.G. Jung, all good cultural creations come in the end not from the convoluted conscious mind of the creator, but straight from the Collective Uncouscious. It is like a storehouse for a vast number of interconnected symbols and ideas undissociable from potent emotions, in each people's mind, DNA, or not of material nature(whatever). Much like a boundless sea of informations ( as above as below from esoterics ? ). 3) Freud said that people were always, anyhow or any number of time getting laid they were, fundamentaly unsatisfied. Unable to reach the same degre of happiness, complete unity and extasy they got a shot at when in the womb of their mother(or they are meant to do so, but in utero trauma exist too). He said too that infants were strangely never satisfied by breast-feeding, that they were seeking in breastfeeding and later sexual touches, the same 'oceanic feeling' that Lacan will called later "Jouissance", which is to mere sensual/sexual pleasure what transcendance of the soul is to mere enjoyment. 4) Lacan said what populates people unconscious imagery, is not a "penis", mistake that led to think people were innately afraid of being physicaly castrated, but a Phallus, symbol for that Jouissance, hence the permanent nevrosis/frustration. 'Penises' in cures couldn't mean true penises as firstly, there is no symetric symbol of vagina in either sex's unconscious before puberty, and two, because coït is neither wanted by either of the sexes nor a physical option before. Hence the notion of Sacred Phallus, common in 19th century's ethnology, the natural symbol for the 'numinous' energy (Jung terms). As much a clitoris as a penis, besides. 5) People sublimate while projecting this oceanic feeling on any kind of things : climbing montains to death, like trying to reach an orgasm('little death'), music, the physical sensation of exhaustion(brain chemicals induced state) in sport and so on. 6) Most people confuse mere pleasure of the organs, and bliss, which goes far beyond, and moreover in a heterosexual coïtal context. Freud made it clear that two sexual functions are completely independant: one he called polymorph(or infantile, but it never stops), the other 'reproductive', focused on vaginal penetration, whose finality is obviously making babies. He gave to the first function pleasure as a finality, but it is nonsensical : if an instinct was its own rational, the individual would waste more and more ressources on it, fucking more and more to no end, being disavantaged toward survival, and his bloodline would quickly get eliminated, for more skilled and strong ones. Would the offspring of this freak be big, the species would weaken steadily, being eliminated as whole. 7) Fucking to no end is what we do, if it wasn't people would be happier with their material condition, at least much more creative in their life. Ancient people even those who ignored the concrete use of semen, stated it flatly. Conclusion : My statement is that the true finality of the overwhelming sexual urge, is not making babies, but reaching what we feel as "magic", EPS, mystical experiences, transcendance, a lasting sense of 'completion' beyond words, and while we forgot that use, genuine creative peoples' unconscious expressed it all around the place since times immemorial, trying to correct this fundamental mistake despite a lasting cultural occultation. From the evolutionary point of view, EPS is of course useful for survival in wild nature : finding good food, avoiding deathly snake bites ... Further, you see I've just been collating Freud, Jung, Lacan and Reich(who said 'the pleasure in energy per se'). I can provide developement or citations as you want. ps: please send MP for writing mistakes, it was quite long.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Oct 22, 2015 1:06 pm Mehdi_Saada wrote: You can say all this because you don't perceive at all what I do in the symbols of the series, you think symbols and names or more or less gratuitous. As long as you do, for sure we won't agree on much things !

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Oct 22, 2015 1:25 pm Just a minor point, since I am in complete agreement with you otherwise Aura: AuraTwilight wrote: The problem is that Extrasensory Perception doesn't exist in Evangelion. It's never demonstrated by any characters or any of the Angels and there's no evidence that it ever happened in the Evangelion universe. The fact that you think ESP is real in our universe and that you're not fond of the Manual explanation is literally irrelevant.

[]:             Quote Post by mehdi_saada » Thu Oct 22, 2015 3:42 pm No it fucking doesn't. I say this as someone who's celebrated at those festivals. The festival celebrates the phallus is a symbol of procreation and life-giving, and the Lance does the exact opposite of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 22, 2015 4:37 pm mehdi_saada wrote: To the modo : I ain't bearing a grudge toward anyone, but AuraTwilight, because of her/his arrogant way of speaking without proofs.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Oct 22, 2015 5:28 pm Bagheera wrote: his isn't quite true. The train scene in ep 19, where Touji effectively "listens in", can be argued to be evidence that Rei has some form of ESP abilities (latent telepathy, or . . . something). Similarly, P3II seemingly connects the minds of Shinji, Misato, Asuka and Rei even though their souls haven't yet been collected for Instrumentality proper. It isn't quite clear how this is happening, but I'm not sure how it could be explained as anything other than some sort of telepathic link. This has nothing to do with the SDSS, though, so your point is otherwise on the mark.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 22, 2015 6:09 pm I think a time out might do everyone in this thread some good. Certainly It would help if there was less omnislashing going on. Okay, try again with a bit less hostile attitudes.

I understand why many people want to accept the FAR stuff as canon, it gives a rational to that disturbing fact. - Bu
